          +----------+
          |  Output  |
          +----------+
                ^
       +--------+--------+
       |                 |
       |                 |
+------+------+   +------+-----+
|  Transform  |   |  Validate  |
+-------------+   +------------+
       ^                 ^
       |                 |
       +-------+---------+
               |
         +-----+-----+
         |  Process  |
         +-----------+
               ^
               |
               |
          +----+----+
          |  Input  |
          +---------+
